DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Monte Haney (CDC#v-72062) for Plaintiff in Pro Per telephonically.
James Lasart, Esq. (415-788-1900) of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney for Defendant

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court calls Line 3 and 4 simultaneously (CGC-15-543641 AND CGC-15-543642) and shares his views to parties. The Court cannot proceed on both statute of limitations and absence of innocence. Plaintiff argues and cites cases. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RANDY MONTESANO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
